title: Maryland: Maryland Online Data Privacy Act (MODPA) deletion & opt-out
summary: Maryland residents can request deletion of the personal data a business holds and opt out of its sale and targeted advertising, including through a recognized universal opt-out signal. Maryland is one of the strongest state laws on data minimization and bans the sale of sensitive data outright. The MODPA took effect on October 1, 2025.
disclaimer: General information, not legal advice, and not yet independently reviewed — verify the current process and your eligibility before relying on it.
